name: Traditional Three Leg Floor Lamp Black - Threshold™
description:
Create the perfect ambiance with this Traditional Three-Leg Floor Lamp from Threshold™. Standing 62 inches high, this sleek floor lamp showcases a white cotton fabric shade in a drum shape atop a black metal pole body with a gold-tone base featuring three legs for a standout look. The convenient turn knob rotary switch offers one-way on/off control for easy operation, and the six-foot cord provides flexible placement.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
